AQ, Venlafaxine XR, Azithromycin, Aspirin, Vitamin D, Senna, Heparin, Insulin, Fluticasone Propionate 110mcg, Methylprednisolone Na Succ., Albuterol Neb Soln, Ipratropium Bromide Neb, Prednisone, Zolpidem Tartrate.
